action_mappings.release_treatment_space: release treatment space {} from patient case {}
action_mappings.release_stretcher_reservation: release stretcher {} reservation for patient case {}
action_mappings.prepare_stretcher_for_transfer: prepare stretcher {} for transfer of patient case {}
action_mappings.apply_triage_tag: apply triage tag device {} to patient case {}
action_mappings.confirm_stretcher_and_logistics: confirm stretcher {} and logistics staff {} for patient case {}
action_mappings.confirm_staging_with_receiving_facility: confirm staging of patient case {} with receiving facility {}
action_mappings.reserve_supply_kit: reserve supply kit {} for patient case {}
action_mappings.release_supply_kit: release supply kit {} from patient case {}
action_mappings.reserve_medical_equipment: reserve medical equipment {} for patient case {}
action_mappings.release_medical_equipment: release medical equipment {} from patient case {}
action_mappings.reserve_specialty_team: reserve specialty team {} for patient case {}
action_mappings.release_specialty_team: release specialty team {} from patient case {}
action_mappings.reserve_care_pathway: reserve care pathway {} for patient case {}
action_mappings.release_care_pathway: release care pathway {} from patient case {}
action_mappings.assign_treatment_episode: assign treatment episode to patient case {} with clinician {}, supply kit {}, and medical equipment {}
action_mappings.assign_treatment_episode_with_specialty_: assign treatment episode with specialty and diagnostic to patient case {} using clinician {}, specialty team {}, and diagnostic resource {}
action_mappings.authorize_treatment_start: authorize treatment start for patient case {} using supply kit {} and medical equipment {}
action_mappings.initiate_treatment: initiate treatment for patient case {} using supply kit {}, medical equipment {}, and ground transport {}
action_mappings.initiate_treatment_with_specialty: initiate treatment for patient case {} with specialty team {} following care pathway {} using air transport {}
action_mappings.finalize_treatment_authorization: finalize treatment authorization for patient case {} using supply kit {} and medical equipment {}
action_mappings.reassess_and_restage: reassess and restage patient case {} using stretcher {} with assistance from logistics staff {}
action_mappings.mark_ready_for_transfer_with_stretcher: mark patient case {} as ready for transfer using stretcher {}
action_mappings.mark_ready_for_transfer_with_tag: mark patient case {} as ready for transfer using triage tag device {}
action_mappings.reserve_receiving_facility: reserve receiving facility {} for patient case {}
action_mappings.confirm_receiving_facility_acceptance_fo: confirm acceptance of in hospital patient {} by receiving facility {} for on scene patient {}
action_mappings.mark_ready_for_transport: mark patient case {} as ready for transport using stretcher {} with assistance from logistics staff {}
action_mappings.finalize_disposition_no_transfer: finalize disposition for patient case {} without transfer
action_mappings.finalize_disposition_with_facility: finalize disposition for patient case {} with transfer to receiving facility {}
action_mappings.finalize_disposition_with_transport_read: finalize disposition for patient case {} with transport ready

action_mappings_indef.register_patient_case: register a patient case {} as present
action_mappings_indef.assign_treatment_space: assign a patient case {} to a treatment space {}
action_mappings_indef.release_treatment_space: release a treatment space {} from a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_stretcher_for_patient: reserve a stretcher {} for a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_stretcher_reservation: release a stretcher {} reservation for a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.prepare_stretcher_for_transfer: prepare a stretcher {} for transfer of a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_triage_tag: apply a triage tag device {} to a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_stretcher_and_logistics: confirm a stretcher {} and a logistics staff {} for a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_staging_with_receiving_facility: confirm staging of a patient case {} with a receiving facility {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_supply_kit: reserve a supply kit {} for a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_supply_kit: release a supply kit {} from a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_medical_equipment: reserve a medical equipment {} for a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_medical_equipment: release a medical equipment {} from a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_specialty_team: reserve a specialty team {} for a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_specialty_team: release a specialty team {} from a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_care_pathway: reserve a care pathway {} for a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_care_pathway: release a care pathway {} from a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_treatment_episode: assign treatment episode to a patient case {} with a clinician {}, a supply kit {}, and a medical equipment {}
action_mappings_indef.assign_treatment_episode_with_specialty_: assign treatment episode with specialty and diagnostic to a patient case {} using a clinician {}, a specialty team {}, and a diagnostic resource {}
action_mappings_indef.authorize_treatment_start: authorize treatment start for a patient case {} using a supply kit {} and a medical equipment {}
action_mappings_indef.initiate_treatment: initiate treatment for a patient case {} using a supply kit {}, a medical equipment {}, and a ground transport {}
action_mappings_indef.initiate_treatment_with_specialty: initiate treatment for a patient case {} with a specialty team {} following a care pathway {} using an air transport {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_treatment_authorization: finalize treatment authorization for a patient case {} using a supply kit {} and a medical equipment {}
action_mappings_indef.reassess_and_restage: reassess and restage a patient case {} using a stretcher {} with assistance from a logistics staff {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_ready_for_transfer_with_stretcher: mark a patient case {} as ready for transfer using a stretcher {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_ready_for_transfer_with_tag: mark a patient case {} as ready for transfer using a triage tag device {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_receiving_facility: reserve a receiving facility {} for a patient case {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_receiving_facility_acceptance_fo: confirm acceptance of an in hospital patient {} by a receiving facility {} for an on scene patient {}
action_mappings_indef.mark_ready_for_transport: mark a patient case {} as ready for transport using a stretcher {} with assistance from a logistics staff {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_disposition_no_transfer: finalize disposition for a patient case {} without transfer
action_mappings_indef.finalize_disposition_with_facility: finalize disposition for a patient case {} with transfer to a receiving facility {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_disposition_with_transport_read: finalize disposition for a patient case {} with transport ready

predicate_mappings.assigned_treatment_space: {} is assigned to the treatment space {}
predicate_mappings.reserved_treatment_space: the treatment space is reserved for {}
predicate_mappings.pre_transport_preparation_flag: the pre-transport preparation flag is set for {}
predicate_mappings.reserved_supply_kit: {} is a reserved supply kit for {}
predicate_mappings.ready_for_transfer_flag: {} has a ready for transfer flag
predicate_mappings.triage_tag_applied: a triage tag is applied to {}
predicate_mappings.facility_request_eligibility: {} is eligible for a facility request at {}
predicate_mappings.triage_tag_available: the triage tag device {} is available
predicate_mappings.eligible_treatment_space: the patient case {} is eligible for the treatment space {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_clinician: the patient case {} is eligible for the clinician {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_supply_kit: the patient case {} is eligible for the supply kit {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_medical_equipment: the patient case {} is eligible for the medical equipment {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_specialty_team: the patient case {} is eligible for the specialty team {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_diagnostic_resource: the patient case {} is eligible for the diagnostic resource {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_care_pathway: the patient case {} is eligible for the care pathway {}
predicate_mappings.eligible_transport_option: the patient case {} is eligible for the transport option {}
predicate_mappings.reserved_receiving_facility: the receiving facility {} is reserved for the patient case {}
predicate_mappings.is_on_scene: the patient case {} is on scene
predicate_mappings.is_in_hospital: the patient case {} is in the hospital
predicate_mappings.reserved_stretcher: the patient case {} has reserved the stretcher {}
predicate_mappings.awaiting_treatment_authorization: the patient case {} is awaiting treatment authorization
predicate_mappings.on_scene_facility_compatibility: the patient case {} is being checked for compatibility with the receiving facility {}

register_patient_case.description: register a patient case A as present
preconditions: I can only register a patient case A as present if it is not the case that A is registered as present and it is not the case that A has a finalized disposition
effects: Once I register a patient case A as present, it is the case that A is registered as present

assign_treatment_space.description: assign a patient case A to a treatment space B
preconditions: I can only assign a patient case A to a treatment space B if it is the case that A is registered as present and the treatment space B is available and the patient case A is eligible for the treatment space B
I can only assign a patient case A to a treatment space B if it is not the case that the treatment space is reserved for A
effects: Once I assign a patient case A to a treatment space B, it is the case that A is assigned to the treatment space B and the treatment space is reserved for A
Once I assign a patient case A to a treatment space B, it is not the case anymore that the treatment space B is available

release_treatment_space.description: release a treatment space B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a treatment space B from a patient case A if it is the case that A is assigned to the treatment space B
I can only release a treatment space B from a patient case A if it is not the case that A has an evaluated flag and it is not the case that A has an in treatment flag
effects: Once I release a treatment space B from a patient case A, it is the case that the treatment space B is available

Once I release a treatment space B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the treatment space B and it is not the case anymore that the treatment space is reserved for A and it is not the case anymore that the pre transport preparation flag is set for A and it is not the case anymore that A is staged for treatment and it is not the case anymore that a triage tag is applied to A and it is not the case anymore that treatment has been initiated for A and it is not the case anymore that the patient case A is awaiting treatment authorization

reserve_stretcher_for_patient.description: reserve a stretcher B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a stretcher B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered as present and the stretcher B is available
effects: Once I reserve a stretcher B for a patient case A, it is the case that the patient case A has reserved the stretcher B
Once I reserve a stretcher B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that the stretcher B is available

release_stretcher_reservation.description: release a stretcher B reservation for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a stretcher B reservation for a patient case A if it is the case that the patient case A has reserved the stretcher B
effects: Once I release a stretcher B reservation for a patient case A, it is the case that the stretcher B is available
Once I release a stretcher B reservation for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that the patient case A has reserved the stretcher B

prepare_stretcher_for_transfer.description: prepare a stretcher B for transfer of a patient case A
preconditions: I can only prepare a stretcher B for transfer of a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered as present and the treatment space is reserved for A and the patient case A has reserved the stretcher B
I can only prepare a stretcher B for transfer of a patient case A if it is not the case that the pre transport preparation flag is set for A
effects: Once I prepare a stretcher B for transfer of a patient case A, it is the case that the pre transport preparation flag is set for A

apply_triage_tag.description: apply a triage tag device B to a patient case A
preconditions: I can only apply a triage tag device B to a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered as present and the treatment space is reserved for A and the triage tag device B is available
I can only apply a triage tag device B to a patient case A if it is not the case that the pre transport preparation flag is set for A
effects: Once I apply a triage tag device B to a patient case A, it is the case that the pre transport preparation flag is set for A and a triage tag is applied to A
Once I apply a triage tag device B to a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that the triage tag device B is available

confirm_stretcher_and_logistics.description: confirm a stretcher B and a logistics staff C for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only confirm a stretcher B and a logistics staff C for a patient case A if it is the case that the pre transport preparation flag is set for A and the treatment space is reserved for A and the patient case A has reserved the stretcher B and the logistics staff C is available
I can only confirm a stretcher B and a logistics staff C for a patient case A if it is not the case that A is staged for treatment
effects: Once I confirm a stretcher B and a logistics staff C for a patient case A, it is the case that A is staged for treatment
Once I confirm a stretcher B and a logistics staff C for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that a triage tag is applied to A

confirm_staging_with_receiving_facility.description: confirm staging of a patient case A with a receiving facility B
preconditions: I can only confirm staging of a patient case A with a receiving facility B if it is the case that the treatment space is reserved for A and B has confirmed acceptance of A
I can only confirm staging of a patient case A with a receiving facility B if it is not the case that A is staged for treatment
effects: Once I confirm staging of a patient case A with a receiving facility B, it is the case that A is staged for treatment
Once I confirm staging of a patient case A with a receiving facility B, it is not the case anymore that a triage tag is applied to A

reserve_supply_kit.description: reserve a supply kit B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a supply kit B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered as present and the supply kit B is available and the patient case A is eligible for the supply kit B
effects: Once I reserve a supply kit B for a patient case A, it is the case that B is a reserved supply kit for A
Once I reserve a supply kit B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that the supply kit B is available

release_supply_kit.description: release a supply kit B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a supply kit B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is a reserved supply kit for A
effects: Once I release a supply kit B from a patient case A, it is the case that the supply kit B is available
Once I release a supply kit B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is a reserved supply kit for A

reserve_medical_equipment.description: reserve a medical equipment B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a medical equipment B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered as present and the medical equipment B is available and the patient case A is eligible for the medical equipment B
effects: Once I reserve a medical equipment B for a patient case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a medical equipment B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that the medical equipment B is available

release_medical_equipment.description: release a medical equipment B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a medical equipment B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a medical equipment B from a patient case A, it is the case that the medical equipment B is available
Once I release a medical equipment B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_specialty_team.description: reserve a specialty team B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a specialty team B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered as present and the specialty team B is available and the patient case A is eligible for the specialty team B
effects: Once I reserve a specialty team B for a patient case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a specialty team B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that the specialty team B is available

release_specialty_team.description: release a specialty team B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a specialty team B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a specialty team B from a patient case A, it is the case that the specialty team B is available
Once I release a specialty team B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_care_pathway.description: reserve a care pathway B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a care pathway B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered as present and the care pathway B is available and the patient case A is eligible for the care pathway B
effects: Once I reserve a care pathway B for a patient case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a care pathway B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that the care pathway B is available

release_care_pathway.description: release a care pathway B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a care pathway B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a care pathway B from a patient case A, it is the case that the care pathway B is available
Once I release a care pathway B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

assign_treatment_episode.description: assign treatment episode to a patient case A with a clinician B, a supply kit C, and a medical equipment D
preconditions: I can only assign treatment episode to a patient case A with a clinician B, a supply kit C, and a medical equipment D if it is the case that the treatment space is reserved for A and C is a reserved supply kit for A and D is reserved for A and the clinician B is available and the patient case A is eligible for the clinician B
I can only assign treatment episode to a patient case A with a clinician B, a supply kit C, and a medical equipment D if it is not the case that A has an evaluated flag
effects: Once I assign treatment episode to a patient case A with a clinician B, a supply kit C, and a medical equipment D, it is the case that B is assigned to A and A has an evaluated flag
Once I assign treatment episode to a patient case A with a clinician B, a supply kit C, and a medical equipment D, it is not the case anymore that the clinician B is available

assign_treatment_episode_with_specialty_.description: assign treatment episode with specialty and diagnostic to a patient case A using a clinician B, a specialty team C, and a diagnostic resource D
preconditions: I can only assign treatment episode with specialty and diagnostic to a patient case A using a clinician B, a specialty team C, and a diagnostic resource D if it is the case that the treatment space is reserved for A and C is reserved for A and the diagnostic resource D is available and the clinician B is available and the patient case A is eligible for the clinician B and the patient case A is eligible for the diagnostic resource D

I can only assign treatment episode with specialty and diagnostic to a patient case A using a clinician B, a specialty team C, and a diagnostic resource D if it is not the case that A has an evaluated flag
effects: Once I assign treatment episode with specialty and diagnostic to a patient case A using a clinician B, a specialty team C, and a diagnostic resource D, it is the case that B is assigned to A and A has an evaluated flag and the patient case A is awaiting treatment authorization and a triage tag is applied to A

Once I assign treatment episode with specialty and diagnostic to a patient case A using a clinician B, a specialty team C, and a diagnostic resource D, it is not the case anymore that the clinician B is available and it is not the case anymore that the diagnostic resource D is available

authorize_treatment_start.description: authorize treatment start for a patient case A using a supply kit B and a medical equipment C
preconditions: I can only authorize treatment start for a patient case A using a supply kit B and a medical equipment C if it is the case that A has an evaluated flag and the patient case A is awaiting treatment authorization and B is a reserved supply kit for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I authorize treatment start for a patient case A using a supply kit B and a medical equipment C, it is not the case anymore that the patient case A is awaiting treatment authorization and it is not the case anymore that a triage tag is applied to A

initiate_treatment.description: initiate treatment for a patient case A using a supply kit B, a medical equipment C, and a ground transport D
preconditions: I can only initiate treatment for a patient case A using a supply kit B, a medical equipment C, and a ground transport D if it is the case that A is staged for treatment and A has an evaluated flag and B is a reserved supply kit for A and C is reserved for A and the patient case A is eligible for the transport option D

I can only initiate treatment for a patient case A using a supply kit B, a medical equipment C, and a ground transport D if it is not the case that a triage tag is applied to A and it is not the case that A has an in treatment flag
effects: Once I initiate treatment for a patient case A using a supply kit B, a medical equipment C, and a ground transport D, it is the case that A has an in treatment flag

initiate_treatment_with_specialty.description: initiate treatment for a patient case A with a specialty team B following a care pathway C using an air transport D
preconditions: I can only initiate treatment for a patient case A with a specialty team B following a care pathway C using an air transport D if it is the case that A is staged for treatment and A has an evaluated flag and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A and the patient case A is eligible for the transport option D
I can only initiate treatment for a patient case A with a specialty team B following a care pathway C using an air transport D if it is not the case that A has an in treatment flag
effects: Once I initiate treatment for a patient case A with a specialty team B following a care pathway C using an air transport D, it is the case that A has an in treatment flag and a triage tag is applied to A

finalize_treatment_authorization.description: finalize treatment authorization for a patient case A using a supply kit B and a medical equipment C
preconditions: I can only finalize treatment authorization for a patient case A using a supply kit B and a medical equipment C if it is the case that A has an in treatment flag and a triage tag is applied to A and B is a reserved supply kit for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I finalize treatment authorization for a patient case A using a supply kit B and a medical equipment C, it is the case that treatment has been initiated for A

Once I finalize treatment authorization for a patient case A using a supply kit B and a medical equipment C, it is not the case anymore that a triage tag is applied to A and it is not the case anymore that A is staged for treatment and it is not the case anymore that the patient case A is awaiting treatment authorization

reassess_and_restage.description: reassess and restage a patient case A using a stretcher B with assistance from a logistics staff C
preconditions: I can only reassess and restage a patient case A using a stretcher B with assistance from a logistics staff C if it is the case that treatment has been initiated for A and A has an in treatment flag and the treatment space is reserved for A and the patient case A has reserved the stretcher B and the logistics staff C is available
I can only reassess and restage a patient case A using a stretcher B with assistance from a logistics staff C if it is not the case that A is staged for treatment
effects: Once I reassess and restage a patient case A using a stretcher B with assistance from a logistics staff C, it is the case that A is staged for treatment

mark_ready_for_transfer_with_stretcher.description: mark a patient case A as ready for transfer using a stretcher B
preconditions: I can only mark a patient case A as ready for transfer using a stretcher B if it is the case that A has an in treatment flag and A is staged for treatment and the patient case A has reserved the stretcher B
I can only mark a patient case A as ready for transfer using a stretcher B if it is not the case that a triage tag is applied to A and it is not the case that A has a ready for transfer flag
effects: Once I mark a patient case A as ready for transfer using a stretcher B, it is the case that A has a ready for transfer flag

mark_ready_for_transfer_with_tag.description: mark a patient case A as ready for transfer using a triage tag device B
preconditions: I can only mark a patient case A as ready for transfer using a triage tag device B if it is the case that A has an in treatment flag and A is staged for treatment and the triage tag device B is available
I can only mark a patient case A as ready for transfer using a triage tag device B if it is not the case that a triage tag is applied to A and it is not the case that A has a ready for transfer flag
effects: Once I mark a patient case A as ready for transfer using a triage tag device B, it is the case that A has a ready for transfer flag
Once I mark a patient case A as ready for transfer using a triage tag device B, it is not the case anymore that the triage tag device B is available

reserve_receiving_facility.description: reserve a receiving facility B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a receiving facility B for a patient case A if it is the case that A has a ready for transfer flag and the receiving facility B is available and the patient case A is being checked for compatibility with the receiving facility B
effects: Once I reserve a receiving facility B for a patient case A, it is the case that the receiving facility B is reserved for the patient case A
Once I reserve a receiving facility B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that the receiving facility B is available

confirm_receiving_facility_acceptance_fo.description: confirm acceptance of an in hospital patient A by a receiving facility C for an on scene patient B
preconditions: I can only confirm acceptance of an in hospital patient A by a receiving facility C for an on scene patient B if it is the case that A is registered as present and the patient case A is in the hospital and A is eligible for a facility request at C and the receiving facility C is reserved for the patient case B
I can only confirm acceptance of an in hospital patient A by a receiving facility C for an on scene patient B if it is not the case that C has confirmed acceptance of A
effects: Once I confirm acceptance of an in hospital patient A by a receiving facility C for an on scene patient B, it is the case that C has confirmed acceptance of A

mark_ready_for_transport.description: mark a patient case A as ready for transport using a stretcher B with assistance from a logistics staff C
preconditions: I can only mark a patient case A as ready for transport using a stretcher B with assistance from a logistics staff C if it is the case that A is registered as present and the patient case A is in the hospital and A is staged for treatment and A has a ready for transfer flag and the patient case A has reserved the stretcher B and the logistics staff C is available
I can only mark a patient case A as ready for transport using a stretcher B with assistance from a logistics staff C if it is not the case that the transport for A is ready
effects: Once I mark a patient case A as ready for transport using a stretcher B with assistance from a logistics staff C, it is the case that the transport for A is ready

finalize_disposition_no_transfer.description: finalize disposition for a patient case A without transfer
preconditions: I can only finalize disposition for a patient case A without transfer if it is the case that the patient case A is on scene and A is registered as present and the treatment space is reserved for A and A has an evaluated flag and A has an in treatment flag and A has a ready for transfer flag and A is staged for treatment
I can only finalize disposition for a patient case A without transfer if it is not the case that A has a finalized disposition
effects: Once I finalize disposition for a patient case A without transfer, it is the case that A has a finalized disposition

finalize_disposition_with_facility.description: finalize disposition for a patient case A with transfer to a receiving facility B
preconditions: I can only finalize disposition for a patient case A with transfer to a receiving facility B if it is the case that the patient case A is in the hospital and A is registered as present and the treatment space is reserved for A and A has an evaluated flag and A has an in treatment flag and A has a ready for transfer flag and A is staged for treatment and B has confirmed acceptance of A
I can only finalize disposition for a patient case A with transfer to a receiving facility B if it is not the case that A has a finalized disposition
effects: Once I finalize disposition for a patient case A with transfer to a receiving facility B, it is the case that A has a finalized disposition

finalize_disposition_with_transport_read.description: finalize disposition for a patient case A with transport ready
preconditions: I can only finalize disposition for a patient case A with transport ready if it is the case that the patient case A is in the hospital and A is registered as present and the treatment space is reserved for A and A has an evaluated flag and A has an in treatment flag and A has a ready for transfer flag and A is staged for treatment and the transport for A is ready
I can only finalize disposition for a patient case A with transport ready if it is not the case that A has a finalized disposition
effects: Once I finalize disposition for a patient case A with transport ready, it is the case that A has a finalized disposition

action_nl_templates.assign_treatment_space: assign patient case {?patient_case} to treatment space {?treatment_space}
action_nl_templates.release_treatment_space: release treatment space {?treatment_space} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_stretcher_reservation: release stretcher {?stretcher} reservation for patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.prepare_stretcher_for_transfer: prepare stretcher {?stretcher} for transfer of patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_triage_tag: apply triage tag device {?triage_tag_device} to patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_stretcher_and_logistics: confirm stretcher {?stretcher} and logistics staff {?logistics_staff} for patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_staging_with_receiving_facility: confirm staging of patient case {?patient_case} with receiving facility {?receiving_facility}
action_nl_templates.reserve_supply_kit: reserve supply kit {?supply_kit} for patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_supply_kit: release supply kit {?supply_kit} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_medical_equipment: reserve medical equipment {?medical_equipment} for patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_medical_equipment: release medical equipment {?medical_equipment} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_specialty_team: reserve specialty team {?specialty_team} for patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_specialty_team: release specialty team {?specialty_team} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_care_pathway: reserve care pathway {?care_pathway} for patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_care_pathway: release care pathway {?care_pathway} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_treatment_episode: assign treatment episode to patient case {?patient_case} with clinician {?clinician}, supply kit {?supply_kit}, and medical equipment {?medical_equipment}
action_nl_templates.assign_treatment_episode_with_specialty_: assign treatment episode with specialty and diagnostic to patient case {?patient_case} using clinician {?clinician}, specialty team {?specialty_team}, and diagnostic resource {?diagnostic_resource}
action_nl_templates.authorize_treatment_start: authorize treatment start for patient case {?patient_case} using supply kit {?supply_kit} and medical equipment {?medical_equipment}
action_nl_templates.initiate_treatment: initiate treatment for patient case {?patient_case} using supply kit {?supply_kit}, medical equipment {?medical_equipment}, and ground transport {?ground_transport}
action_nl_templates.initiate_treatment_with_specialty: initiate treatment for patient case {?patient_case} with specialty team {?specialty_team} following care pathway {?care_pathway} using air transport {?air_transport}
action_nl_templates.finalize_treatment_authorization: finalize treatment authorization for patient case {?patient_case} using supply kit {?supply_kit} and medical equipment {?medical_equipment}
action_nl_templates.reassess_and_restage: reassess and restage patient case {?patient_case} using stretcher {?stretcher} with assistance from logistics staff {?logistics_staff}
action_nl_templates.mark_ready_for_transfer_with_stretcher: mark patient case {?patient_case} as ready for transfer using stretcher {?stretcher}
action_nl_templates.mark_ready_for_transfer_with_tag: mark patient case {?patient_case} as ready for transfer using triage tag device {?triage_tag_device}
action_nl_templates.reserve_receiving_facility: reserve receiving facility {?receiving_facility} for patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_receiving_facility_acceptance_fo: confirm acceptance of in hospital patient {?in_hospital_patient} by receiving facility {?receiving_facility} for on scene patient {?on_scene_patient}
action_nl_templates.mark_ready_for_transport: mark patient case {?patient_case} as ready for transport using stretcher {?stretcher} with assistance from logistics staff {?logistics_staff}
action_nl_templates.finalize_disposition_no_transfer: finalize disposition for patient case {?patient_case} without transfer
action_nl_templates.finalize_disposition_with_facility: finalize disposition for patient case {?patient_case} with transfer to receiving facility {?receiving_facility}
action_nl_templates.finalize_disposition_with_transport_read: finalize disposition for patient case {?patient_case} with transport ready

predicate_nl_templates.triage_tag_available: the triage tag device {?triage_tag_device} is available

action_nl_templates_indef.register_patient_case: register a patient case {?patient_case} as present
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_treatment_space: assign a patient case {?patient_case} to a treatment space {?treatment_space}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_treatment_space: release a treatment space {?treatment_space} from a patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_stretcher_for_patient: reserve a stretcher {?stretcher} for a patient case {?patient_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_supply_kit: release a supply kit {?supply_kit} from a patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_medical_equipment: reserve a medical equipment {?medical_equipment} for a patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_medical_equipment: release a medical equipment {?medical_equipment} from a patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_specialty_team: reserve a specialty team {?specialty_team} for a patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_specialty_team: release a specialty team {?specialty_team} from a patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_care_pathway: reserve a care pathway {?care_pathway} for a patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_care_pathway: release a care pathway {?care_pathway} from a patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_treatment_episode: assign treatment episode to a patient case {?patient_case} with a clinician {?clinician}, a supply kit {?supply_kit}, and a medical equipment {?medical_equipment}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_treatment_episode_with_specialty_: assign treatment episode with specialty and diagnostic to a patient case {?patient_case} using a clinician {?clinician}, a specialty team {?specialty_team}, and a diagnostic resource {?diagnostic_resource}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_treatment_start: authorize treatment start for a patient case {?patient_case} using a supply kit {?supply_kit} and a medical equipment {?medical_equipment}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_treatment: initiate treatment for a patient case {?patient_case} using a supply kit {?supply_kit}, a medical equipment {?medical_equipment}, and a ground transport {?ground_transport}
action_nl_templates_indef.initiate_treatment_with_specialty: initiate treatment for a patient case {?patient_case} with a specialty team {?specialty_team} following a care pathway {?care_pathway} using an air transport {?air_transport}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_treatment_authorization: finalize treatment authorization for a patient case {?patient_case} using a supply kit {?supply_kit} and a medical equipment {?medical_equipment}
action_nl_templates_indef.reassess_and_restage: reassess and restage a patient case {?patient_case} using a stretcher {?stretcher} with assistance from a logistics staff {?logistics_staff}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_ready_for_transfer_with_stretcher: mark a patient case {?patient_case} as ready for transfer using a stretcher {?stretcher}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_ready_for_transfer_with_tag: mark a patient case {?patient_case} as ready for transfer using a triage tag device {?triage_tag_device}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_receiving_facility: reserve a receiving facility {?receiving_facility} for a patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_receiving_facility_acceptance_fo: confirm acceptance of an in hospital patient {?in_hospital_patient} by a receiving facility {?receiving_facility} for an on scene patient {?on_scene_patient}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_ready_for_transport: mark a patient case {?patient_case} as ready for transport using a stretcher {?stretcher} with assistance from a logistics staff {?logistics_staff}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_disposition_no_transfer: finalize disposition for a patient case {?patient_case} without transfer
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_disposition_with_facility: finalize disposition for a patient case {?patient_case} with transfer to a receiving facility {?receiving_facility}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_disposition_with_transport_read: finalize disposition for a patient case {?patient_case} with transport ready

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a physical object is also a object

Everything that is a patient case or a treatment space or a clinician or a medical equipment or a supply kit or a specialty team or a stretcher or a triage tag device or a receiving facility or a logistics staff or a diagnostic resource or a care pathway or a transport option is also a physical object
Everything that is a ground transport or a air transport is also a transport option
Everything that is a on scene patient or a in hospital patient is also a patient case
